executives.name: Donald James
executives.background: Retired Chairman and CEO of Vulcan Materials Company.

tenure_dates.title: Senior Vice President and General Counsel (1992–1996); President (1996–1997); CEO (1997–2014); Chairman (1997–2015); Director (1996–2015)

executives.name: Kathleen Quirk
executives.background: Ms. Quirk has served as President since 2021 and was appointed Chief Executive Officer effective June 2024. She previously served as Chief Financial Officer from 2003 to 2022 and has been with the company since 1989.

executives.name: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson
executives.background: Kathleen Wilson-Thompson has been a member of the Board since December 2018. She was formerly the Executive Vice President and Global Chief Human Resources Officer of Walgreens Boots Alliance, Inc.

executives.name: Paul Kostuik
executives.background: Mr. Kostuik is a mining engineer with over 35 years of experience in the mining industry.
